sacco.gui - package sacco.gui
 
SButton - Class in sacco.gui
 
SButton() - Constructor for class sacco.gui.SButton
Constructs a blank SButton with no text
SButton(String) - Constructor for class sacco.gui.SButton
Constructs a new SButton with the given text
SComponent - Interface in sacco.gui
 
setBackground(Color) - Method in class sacco.gui.SLabel
Sets the background color according to the given Color object
setBold(boolean) - Method in class sacco.gui.Font
Sets the font to be bold or not according to the parameter of the method
setColor(Color) - Method in class sacco.gui.SLabel
Sets the text color according to the given Color object
setFont(Font) - Method in class sacco.gui.SButton
Sets the font of the butotn according to the FOnt object passed as the parameter
setFont(Font) - Method in class sacco.gui.SLabel
Sets the font of the SLabel according to the given Font object
setItalic(boolean) - Method in class sacco.gui.Font
Sets the font to be italic or not according to the parameter of the method
setLayout(LayoutManager) - Method in class sacco.gui.SFrame
Sets the layout manager for the SFrame.
setLayout(LayoutManager) - Method in class sacco.gui.SPanel
 
setResizable(boolean) - Method in class sacco.gui.SFrame
Sets the resizability of the SFrame.
setSize(int, int) - Method in class sacco.gui.SFrame
Sets the size of the SFrame's window to the given width and height
setTitle(String) - Method in class sacco.gui.SFrame
Sets the title of the SFrame to the given String
setVisible(boolean) - Method in class sacco.gui.SFrame
Sets the visibility of the SFrame's window.
SFrame - Class in sacco.gui
 
SFrame() - Constructor for class sacco.gui.SFrame
Constructs an SFrame object with no title
SFrame(String) - Constructor for class sacco.gui.SFrame
Constructs an SFrame object with the given title
